label: Analyst Interview
definition: Findings based on interviews with IS and Line of Business executives

label: Vendor Statement
definition: Information sourced from vendor announcements or stated plans

label: Analyst Expert
definition: Aberdeen analyst expert opinion or contention

label: Product Review
definition: Product capability assessment based on product evaluation

label: Web Research
definition: Outcome verified via web/archival research post-publication

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of a vendor or enterprise strategic position or approach

label: Viability Prediction
definition: A forward-looking prediction about market or technology viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome corresponding to a prediction or assessment

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities maturity or positioning

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Specific measured or documented performance or capability result

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative market size share or adoption data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Aberdeen analyst opinion not based on specific data or vendor input

label: Network Infrastructure
definition: Enterprise networking infrastructure including NOS VPN intranet

label: Directory Services
definition: Enterprise directory services identity and access management
